svg.title: WSP application icon — Concept A, all Windows sizes
svg.desc: Concept A icon (indigo microphone with waveform bars and text lines) shown at 256×256, 128×128, 64×64, 48×48, 32×32, 24×24, and 16×16 pixels with usage labels.
svg.text: Taskbar (48 px active) + system tray (16 px)
Use 32-bit RGBA PNG at each size. The 256 px frame should be stored as PNG-compressed inside the ICO for file size.
